message:
perf(mail): batch hook mail queries into single bd list call

Replace N parallel bd list calls (2-3 per identity variant) with a single
bd list --type message call and client-side filtering. Process-spawn overhead
dominates query time, so 1 broad call beats N narrow calls (~67% reduction).

Fixes: gt-3j0vj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
